Video.summary: On this season finale, Matt and Lou have their final confrontation and the team loses a member.
Video.title: The Final Shot

Video.summary: On this season premiere, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn.
Video.title: The Road to Recovery

Video.summary: Sonia's recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor.
Video.title: Monk in the Trunk

Video.summary: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia puts herself on the business end of a knife.
Video.title: Super-Sonia

Video.summary: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet: one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist.
Video.title: Interview with the Repo Man

Video.summary: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect?
Video.title: Disaster at the Derby

Video.summary: The team's work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences.
Video.title: The Trouble with Tractors

Video.summary: Matt and Froy crash a meeting to ask for a car, but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle.
Video.title: Welcome Back Rotter

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy disrupt a wild debtor, clash with workers, and face a repo that ends in destruction.
Video.title: Crunch Time

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia repo from yuppie; Sonia, Matt, Froy reclaim from hippie; Matt, Sonia confront fire dancers.
Video.title: Playing with Fire

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy show off their best moves against a team of dance instructors.
Video.title: All the Wrong Moves

Video.summary: Lou and Sonia are caught in a desperate situation when the owner of their target car is struck.
Video.title: Heart Attack Panic

Video.summary: Sonia and Lou find themselves in the middle of nowhere in a tooth-and-nail fight with a trio of stargazers.
Video.title: Sting Operation Blues

Video.summary: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders.
Video.title: Highway To Be Anger-Prone

Video.summary: Lou and Froy repo an airplane, but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off.
Video.title: Airplane Arrest

Video.summary: Matt and Froy repo a car from a girl whose roommate has been keeping two very big secrets.
Video.title: Secrets and Lies

Video.summary: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's lack of knowledge sets the bus ablaze.
Video.title: The Showstopper

Video.summary: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos.
Video.title: Nursery Crime

Video.summary: With the pressure of Froy's legal problems mounting, the team tries to convince him to hire a lawyer.
Video.title: Call for Help

Video.summary: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected.
Video.title: The Big Letdown

Video.summary: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer, he considers taking matters into his own hands.
Video.title: The Waiting Game

Video.summary: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse.
Video.title: Knife Week

Video.summary: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats, chaos erupts.
Video.title: Think, Adapt and Attack

Video.summary: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous.
Video.title: Cement Mixer

Video.summary: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies.
Video.title: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose

Image.alt: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose

Video.summary: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down.
Video.title: Mess with Texas

Video.summary: Matt and Froy set out to repo a truck from a wealthy Texan.
Video.title: Frankie'd Up Beyond All Recognition

Video.summary: Lou takes his new guys on their very first repo.
Video.title: Monumental Changes

Video.summary: Lou plans an elaborate sting operation to infiltrate a cult, but everything goes awry.
Video.title: Adapt, Improvise, and Overcome

Video.summary: Froy and Sonia repo from a stranded motorist who rallies the neighborhood around his cause.
Video.title: Deep Dish Disaster

Video.summary: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect?
Video.title: Traffic Jammin'

Video.summary: Sonia and Carlos put their best performance in when they attempt to repossess a vehicle.
Video.title: Repo Arigato, Mr. Roboto

Video.summary: Froy and Matt have to wrangle with some angry clowns when they try to repossess a bouncy castle.
Video.title: Inane Clown Posse

Video.summary: When Carlos plays a repossession prank that almost lands Matt and Froy in jail.
Video.title: Doggin' and Draggin'

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy deal with an unbalanced debtor who threatens to take down the entire company.
Video.title: Raising the Roof

Video.summary: Matt and Froy take the opportunity to enact revenge on Ronnie and Carlos.
Video.title: Revenge

Video.summary: Reeling from the shootout, Lou tracks down one of the culprits and enacts and elaborate plot of revenge.
Video.title: Gypsy Hunter

Video.summary: A jazz musician sets off Sonia and punches are thrown as Ronnie tries to manage the mayhem,.
Video.title: Gypsy Barbeque!

Video.summary: When Matt and Froy repo a car from an anger management meeting, Froy suffers the consequences.
Video.title: Up in Flames

Video.summary: When Rusty leads Sonia and Ronnie on a wild goose chase, Sonia loses her cool and puts her foot down with Lou.
Video.title: Gypsy Games

Video.summary: The team's work with anger management starts to pay off - with disastrous consequences.
Video.title: T-Bone Trouble

Video.summary: Lou struggles to pick up the pieces after the accident leaves him needing Sonia more than ever.
Video.title: Flame-Thrown for a Loop

Video.summary: Sonia returns, but not before putting the team on probation and laying some ground rules.
Video.title: Probation Abomination

Video.summary: Matt and Sonia take on a fencing coach, but all bets are off when his students go on the offensive.
Video.title: Russian Roulette

Video.summary: Matt and Froy take on a grungy fisherman.
Video.title: Little Froy's Big Mistake

Video.summary: When Matt and Froy go missing, Sonia is on a mission to figure out what they've got up their sleeves.
Video.title: M.I.A. & D.E.A

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy repo a hummer from a bachelorette who is down to party.
Video.title: Suspicious Packages

Video.summary: Matt and Froy are sent on a wild goose chase around L.A for a mini-van.
Video.title: First Class Clown

Video.summary: When Matt almost gets run down by a posse of graffiti-packing gangsters, he sets into motion a plan of revenge
Video.title: Revenge Gone Wrong

Video.summary: After Ronnie suffers a near-fatal wound during an attack on the lot, he reconsiders his role.
Video.title: Smut Campaign

Video.summary: Ronnie's gotten a raise and a promotion, and Carlos's jealousy sends him looking for more appreciation.
Video.title: Warzone at the Worksite

Video.summary: Matt and Ronnie repo a Porsche from a maniac; Carlos and Ronnie come face to face during their repo.
Video.title: A Vengeful Streak

Video.summary: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo, Carlos tries to make amends.
Video.title: Roll the Dice

Video.summary: It's a brand new start for the Operation Repo team when Lou bets big on a high-risk opportunity .
Video.title: Lou's Big Gamble

Video.summary: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed?
Video.title: All In

Video.summary: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude.
Video.title: Viva Las Vegas!
